name: Cannellini Alla Catania
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over beans and rinse them well. Cover the beans with water in a large kettle; bring to boiling. Cook for 2 minutes, then remove from heat and let stand for 1 hour. Drain the beans and transfer them to an electric slow cooker.
2. Brown sausages in a small skillet. Push them to one side of the pan. Sauté onion and garlic until soft. Stir in tomatoes, bay leaf, thyme, basil, orange strips, salt, pepper, and instant beef broth. Bring to a boil. Stir into beans and cover.
3. Cook on low for 10 hours or on high for 5 hours, or until the beans are tender.
